problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
